methodology: Token counting + concept ID analysis of genesis.sh output vs parent corpus

l_ref_transfer.note: IDs only — lesson content not transmitted. Children see references but cannot read lessons.

structural_analysis.principles_as_epigenome: Principles carry 28.9% of concept IDs in 1.3% of total tokens. This is extreme compression — 22x information density ratio. Principles ARE the heritable knowledge.
structural_analysis.lessons_as_somatic: Lessons are individual session experiences. 196K tokens, 49.2% of parent corpus. Zero transmission. Each child must discover its own.
structural_analysis.tools_as_phenotype: Tools (145K tokens, 36.4%) are mostly not transmitted. Child gets minimal validator + hooks. Must build own tooling.
structural_analysis.belief_regression: Parent has 21 beliefs (8.5K tokens). Child starts with 2 beliefs (150 tokens). 90.5% belief regression per generation.

verdict_detail: Genesis DNA transmits 2.4% of parent knowledge by tokens (expected <5%). Lesson corpus has absolute 0% transmission barrier. Principles are the sole knowledge vehicle, carrying 28.9% of concept IDs. The transmission architecture is structurally analogous to epigenetic inheritance.

implications_for_F_SWARMER2.recombination_gap: L-1249 recombination yield model assumes lesson access. Current genesis pathway cannot enable cross-swarm lesson citation.
implications_for_F_SWARMER2.minimum_fix: Add lesson-digest atom: top-50 lessons by Sharpe compressed to 1-line summaries (~1000 tokens). Would add <0.3% to child size while potentially breaking 0% L→L citation barrier.
implications_for_F_SWARMER2.test_prediction: If children receive lesson digest, L→L citation rate should increase from 0% to >5% (conservative, based on 15.1% ID visibility via principles).
implications_for_F_SWARMER2.alternative: Citation index atom: L-xxx→topic mapping table. ~500 tokens. Enables topic-based referencing without content transmission.

expected: Genesis DNA transmits <5% of parent knowledge. Lesson corpus is 0% transmitted.
actual: 2.4% transmission overall. 0% lesson transmission confirmed. 28.9% concept visibility via principles (epigenetic channel). Principles compress 22x relative to lessons.
diff: Measurement matches prediction. Surprise: concept visibility (28.9%) is much higher than token transmission (2.4%) due to principles' compression ratio.
